case_title: GRANITE EXCAVATION & DEMO VS P G AND E

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY GRANITE EXCAVATION & DEMO AS TO DEFENDANT P G AND E ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
